chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6556 of 2021 Iqbal Ahmed Versus The Chairman FBR & others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh Case 1. For order on CMA No.28027 (Urgent/App). 2. For order on office objection No.25. 3. For hearing of Main Case. 09.11.2021 Petitioner present in person..-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. The petitioner has prayed that respondent Nos.1 and 2, being Chairman Federal Board of Revenue and Senior Superintendent of Police, be directed to take action to collect the tax and to remove the said accused/ respondent No.3 from the said footpath. Previously the petitioner has also filed an identical petition bearing writ petition No.4273/2020 claiming the same relief which was disposed of as being not maintainable in the constitutional jurisdiction. He approached Hon'ble Supreme Court and in terms of annexure A/3 available at page-25 the petition was also returned alongwith original paper book as being not entertainable on number of grounds incorporated in the said letter of learned Registrar of Hon'ble Supreme Court. The petitioner has moved criminal miscellaneous applications before the Additional District Judge apparently for lodging of FIR, however, all in vain. After all this exercise, the petitioner has yet again filed this petition for the identical relief which was earlier declined. He has not exhausted the remedy for removal of the encroachment under the relevant law and as being a whistleblower for a tax evasion. 2 Since earlier petition has already been dismissed, therefore, this writ petition on the identical relief and similar cause of action cannot be entertained.

After all this exercise, the petitioner has yet again filed this petition for the identical relief which was earlier declined. He has not exhausted the remedy for removal of the encroachment under the relevant law and as being a whistleblower for a tax evasion. 2 Since earlier petition has already been dismissed, therefore, this writ petition on the identical relief and similar cause of action cannot be entertained. The instant petition being misconceived is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
